lines: Doctor Cula. Mr. Pig is expecting you. The case can wait the ten minutes Mr. Pig requires for opening remarks.

lines.speaker: murrow
lines.text: [This must be Mr. Murrow. Young and promising. I've read his profile on Ionkionked.]

choices.text: Mr. Murrow. Dr. A. Cula. I was told you'd have a case for me.
Mr. Murrow. Dr. A. Cula. A pleasure to meet you.

lines: Well, well, well. Dr. A. Cula, the famous, promising and talented new hire.
Dr. A. Cula.
Murrow. Mr. Murrow.

states._comment_v1_2_p6: Phase 7 V1.2 pass 6 dialogue. Sikorska eviction defense (V1.4-canonical): 2015 renumbering, flat #7 -> #12, landlord knowledge via 2019 renewal countersignature, motion to set aside, Friday 14:00 courtroom 4, retention pending. Pass-3 'Mrs. Borowski' provisional state superseded; V1.4 has shipped and locks the case content.
lines: Welcome to Pig & Swine. You've picked a noisy day to begin.
We have a lot of work to do. The case is the Sikorska eviction defense. Halina Sikorska, at number twelve; the notice was served to old number seven.
The building was renumbered in two thousand and fifteen. The two thousand and nineteen renewal carries the landlord's countersignature. He served the old door anyway.
Hearing already ran ex parte. The current resident at number seven brought the notice down three weeks late. Actual notice reached her on the twenty-eighth of April.
We file a motion to set aside. Fourteen days from actual notice. We are inside the window.
Procedural binder, second shelf, blue spine. Rights memo clipped inside the front cover. Motion hearing Friday at fourteen hundred, courtroom four.
She has not formally retained yet. She is coming in this afternoon.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: The resident at number seven. Does his accepting the notice cure service?

lines: No. Express authority is required. He had none.
It is Murrow, to friends. The 'Mister' I keep for invoices.

lines.speaker: murrow
lines.text: I am still deciding whether reception staff qualify as friends or as workplace constellations.

lines.speaker: murrow
lines.text: Binder first. Memo second. Find me before fourteen hundred if anything in the binder reads wrong.

lines: You're back without the binder. The shelf has not moved.
Now Crab. Nothing else moves until service is checked.

states._comment: V1.4 coffee reaction — S-grade. Voice draft from minigames.txt §Character reactions §Murrow Perfect ('Acceptable.'). Spec note: 'This should be treated as immense praise.' Murrow's one-word approval is the entire joke; no address-form needed on a single word.
lines: Acceptable.

states._comment: V1.4 coffee reaction — D/F-grade. Voice verbatim from minigames.txt §Character reactions §Murrow Bad ('You have created a beverage with procedural defects.'). Opens with 'Doctor Cula' per Murrow's established speech form in first_meeting and before_pig.
lines: Doctor Cula. You have created a beverage with procedural defects.

states.trigger: chapter1.has_law_binder == true && chapter1.has_rights_memo == true && chapter1.recruited_crab == true && chapter1.recruited_whimsy == true && !chapter1.court_ready
states._comment_borowski_title: PROVISIONAL: 'Mrs. Borowski' usage inherits the same provisional title flag as murrow.json's first_meeting and asia.json's readiness_borowski_confirmed.
lines: Cula.
Procedural binder. On file.
Rights memo. On file.

lines.speaker: pig
lines.text: The printer lease has come back as a kraken. We renew next month, presumably with bait.

lines: Crab and Whimsy on the appearance. Confirmed.
Hearing at fourteen hundred. Courtroom four.

lines.speaker: pig
lines.text: When I was an apprentice, we had no readiness check. Only fear. We navigated by panic alone.

lines: Order set. Service first. Fair hearing second. Remedy last. We leave at thirteen-thirty.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: Understood. Asia, has Mrs. Borowski been told we're coming?

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: She rang an hour ago, Mr. Cula. She'll be there at quarter to.

idle_flavor: The paperwork is current. Whether it is correct is a separate question.
Ensure every form is stamped in triplicate.
Two pages are out of sequence. Not yours.
